svg.title: Session to Mintlify agent pipeline
svg.desc: Three-stage agent flow: extract from session, convert to MDX, push to GitHub which triggers Mintlify deploy.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I export a Claude conversation as structured JSON for processing?')
g.text: 对话内容 · 代码块 · 表格

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What prompt should I use to instruct Claude to extract structured docs from a conversation?')
sendPrompt('How do I programmatically generate MDX files with Mintlify components from JSON?')
sendPrompt('How do I use the Claude API to process a long conversation transcript?')
sendPrompt('How do I write a system prompt to extract Q&A pairs and code blocks from a chat?')
sendPrompt('What JSON schema should the extractor output for each documentation page?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent decide which section of docs.json to route each extracted page to?')
sendPrompt('How do I use the GitHub API to create or update files in a repository from a script?')
sendPrompt('How does Mintlify auto-deploy when a GitHub commit is pushed?')
sendPrompt('Should I use LangGraph or n8n as the orchestrator for this doc sync agent?')
sendPrompt('How do I chain the extractor and MDX writer agents together in LangGraph?')
g.text: 提取 → 转换 → 推送

svg.text: 点击任意节点查看实现细节
